test-case.name: AdbHelpers module exports.exports the expected public commands

test-case.description: skips tar lookup in pull mode
test-case.name: Test-HostTar.skips tar lookup in pull mode

test-case.description: throws when tar is unavailable in tar mode
test-case.name: Test-HostTar.throws when tar is unavailable in tar mode

test-case.description: skips the adb probe in pull mode
test-case.name: Test-PhoneTar.skips the adb probe in pull mode

test-case.description: passes debug parameters through to Invoke-AdbSh
test-case.name: Test-PhoneTar.passes debug parameters through to Invoke-AdbSh

test-case.description: preserves control-structure newlines when flattening the shell script
test-case.name: Invoke-AdbSh.preserves control-structure newlines when flattening the shell script

test-case.description: writes debug log entries when debug logging is enabled
test-case.name: Invoke-AdbSh.writes debug log entries when debug logging is enabled

test-case.description: parses the remote byte count from Invoke-AdbSh output
test-case.name: Remote metadata helpers.parses the remote byte count from Invoke-AdbSh output

test-case.description: returns zero for blank remote byte output
test-case.name: Remote metadata helpers.returns zero for blank remote byte output

test-case.description: parses the remote file count from Invoke-AdbSh output
test-case.name: Remote metadata helpers.parses the remote file count from Invoke-AdbSh output
